revealText: A framework for thinking through friction, not consensus. Four voices, structured rounds, emergence by design.
Store decision moments, not raw chats. Auditable, reversible, identity-persistent decision architecture.
Five levels of decision weight. From seconds-to-undo config changes to irreversible strategic pivots.
Scan, Translate, Evaluate, Abstract, Leverage. Systematic intelligence from chaos.
GPS for AI Reasoning. Published on arXiv. A three-layer reasoning stack: Intent, Abstraction, Chain.

teaserText: 2,000-year-old Tamil couplets grounding modern AI decisions. The oldest code review in history.
A three-layer protocol where privacy is not a feature, it is the foundation.
A 13-book journey through organizational consciousness. Soul, then Body, then Mind.
When ancient literature speaks back. A dialogue engine for the world's oldest wisdom.
